PropTech Solution

Your 24/7 Digital Asset Butler

Breaking distance barriers, making overseas investment as transparent as local.

Solving the "Black Box Anxiety"

The biggest pain point in traditional overseas investment is "Information Asymmetry". Where is the construction stage? Has the tenant paid? Where are the tax reports? In the past, you could only wait passively for agent replies.

DingYao and Crestline introduce an exclusive Digital Fulfillment Management System (Client Portal). Through mobile or desktop, access your personalized dashboard anytime to monitor every cent of your asset dynamics, just like checking a stock portfolio.

24/7 Access
100% Transparency

Notification

Jan Rent Received

+ ZAR 25,000

Three Core Modules

Live Progress Stream

No need to fly to South Africa. We regularly upload drone footage and site inspection reports, ensuring construction quality and schedule are on track.

Financial Dashboard

Integrated with international banking data. Clearly itemize every rental income, levy expense, and maintenance cost. Generate annual tax reports with one click.

Cloud Document Vault

Your title deeds, lease agreements, and insurance policies are encrypted and stored in the cloud. Access and download anytime; never lose important documents.

Experience the Future of Asset Management?

Book a demo now to operate our test account and feel the peace of mind technology brings.
